tests.test_biophysical.test_animal.test_milk_production.test_lactation_curve module

tests.test_biophysical.test_animal.test_milk_production.test_lactation_curve.animal_inputs() → dict[str, Any]
tests.test_biophysical.test_animal.test_milk_production.test_lactation_curve.lactation_inputs() → dict[str, Any]
tests.test_biophysical.test_animal.test_milk_production.test_lactation_curve.test_set_lactation_curve(mocker: MockerFixture, animal_inputs: dict[str, Any], lactation_inputs: dict[str, Any], annual_milk_yield: float, expect_fitting: bool) → None

Test init routine of the LactationCurve module.

tests.test_biophysical.test_animal.test_milk_production.test_lactation_curve.test_get_year_adjustments(mocker: MockerFixture, lactation_inputs: dict[str, Any], expected: dict[str, float], year: int, bounded: bool) → None

Test that year adjustments are retrieved appropriately.

tests.test_biophysical.test_animal.test_milk_production.test_lactation_curve.test_get_region_adjustments(lactation_inputs: dict[str, Any], fips_code: int, expected: dict[str, float]) → None

Test that the region adjustments are retrieved appropriately.

tests.test_biophysical.test_animal.test_milk_production.test_lactation_curve.test_get_milking_frequency_adjustments(lactation_inputs: dict[str, Any], milking_frequency: float, expected: dict[str, float]) → None

Test that the milking frequency adjustments are retrieved appropriately.

tests.test_biophysical.test_animal.test_milk_production.test_lactation_curve.test_calculate_adjusted_wood_parameters(l_param: float, m_param: float, n_param: float, adjustments: list[dict[str, float]], expected: dict[str, float]) → None

Test that the Wood’s parameters are adjusted correctly.

tests.test_biophysical.test_animal.test_milk_production.test_lactation_curve.test_get_wood_parameters(mocker: MockerFixture, parity: int, l_expect: float, m_expect: float, n_expect: float, l_std_dev_expected: float, m_std_dev_expected: float, n_std_dev_expected: float) → None

Test that Wood’s parameters are retrieved correctly from LactationCurve.

tests.test_biophysical.test_animal.test_milk_production.test_lactation_curve.test_adjust_lactation_curve_to_milk_yield(mocker: MockerFixture, animal_inputs: dict[str, Any], lactation_inputs: dict[str, Any]) → None

Test that Wood’s parameters are correctly adjusted based on a farm’s total milk yield.

tests.test_biophysical.test_animal.test_milk_production.test_lactation_curve.test_estimate_305_day_milk_yield_by_parity(mocker: MockerFixture, annual_yield: float, milking_cows: int, p1_frac: float, p2_frac: float, p3_frac: float, p2_adjust: float, p3_adjust: float, expected_p1: float, expected_p2: float, expected_p3: float, error: bool, warning: bool) → None

Test that the 305 day milk yields are correctly predicted for each parity based on a farm’s total milk yield.

tests.test_biophysical.test_animal.test_milk_production.test_lactation_curve.test_fit_wood_l_param_to_milk_yield(l_param: float, milk_yield: float, expected: float) → None

Test that Wood’s l parameter is correctly fitted to a 305 day milk yield.
